metadata.project: Multiagent Learning Platform - VnExpress Contest MVP

completed.description: Features fully implemented and merged to main

pending.description: Tasks not started, ordered by priority

tasks.title: Implement Marketplace Pack Import
tasks.description: Replace placeholder import logic with actual pack copying to user workspace. Currently shows success but doesn't import.
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #44 with follow-up fixes #48 and #49. Import flow clones marketplace packs into imported KBs and registers them in kb_config.

tasks.title: Enhance Assessment Feedback with Analysis
tasks.description: Add detailed analysis breakdown, performance by topic, and learning recommendations in assessment review

scope.database: Extend assessment_results schema with analysis data

tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #44. Assessment review now includes backend analysis, topic signals, and richer frontend progress summaries.

tasks.title: Add KB Context Badges to Tutoring Session
tasks.description: Display active knowledge base context during tutoring to help students understand learning sources

scope.display: Show KB badges near tutor messages or in session header

tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #44. KB context badges render in chat from request snapshot knowledgeBases.

tasks.title: Teacher Knowledge Pack Sharing UI
tasks.description: Add UI for teachers to mark packs as public/team/private and configure sharing settings

scope.backend: deeptutor/api/routers/knowledge.py - extend update endpoint with sharing_status

tasks.notes: Verified on 2026-04-20 as already implemented on main. Evidence: tests/api/test_knowledge_router.py passed (11 tests) and web/app/(utility)/knowledge/page.tsx builds successfully with the teacher metadata/sharing edit flow already present.

tasks.title: Marketplace Pack Preview Modal
tasks.description: Show detailed preview of pack contents before import: documents, assessment samples, learning objectives
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #52. Marketplace now supports compact preview before import.

tasks.title: Student Progress Tracking Dashboard
tasks.description: Add student-view dashboard showing progress across all assessments, trending topics, and mastery levels
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #54. Student dashboard now exposes /dashboard/student and GET /api/v1/dashboard/student-progress.

tasks.title: AI-Powered Assessment Recommendations
tasks.description: Generate personalized next assessment recommendations based on student performance and learning gaps
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #56. Assessment recommendation API now exposes POST /api/v1/assessment/recommend with deterministic next-topic suggestions.

tasks.title: Add Pack Ratings & Reviews System
tasks.description: Allow teachers/students to rate and review knowledge packs in marketplace
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #58. Marketplace now supports lightweight ratings and review submission.

tasks.title: Assessment History Filtering & Search
tasks.description: Add filters and search to teacher dashboard assessment history by date, KB, student, score range
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #60. Teacher dashboard now supports API-backed activity filtering.

tasks.title: Vietnamese LLM Prompt Variants
tasks.description: Add Vietnamese language variants for all LLM prompts in agents (solve, question, research, co_writer)

scope.system: deeptutor/services/prompt/manager.py - already supports vi fallback chain

tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #62. Added Vietnamese prompt variants for the MVP prompt families and prompt-manager regression coverage.

tasks.title: Add Marketplace Pack Sorting Options
tasks.description: Add sort options: popularity (downloads), recent, rating, most_objectives
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #64. Marketplace now supports API-backed sorting by popularity, recency, rating, and objective count.

tasks.title: Assessment Results Export to PDF
tasks.description: Allow students/teachers to export assessment results and feedback as PDF report
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #66. Assessment review pages now support backend-generated PDF export.

tasks.title: Tutoring Session Replay Feature
tasks.description: Show timeline/replay of chat conversation in session review, useful for teacher analysis

scope.display: Timeline view of user messages and tutor responses with timestamps

tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #68. Teacher dashboard now links tutoring activity to a replay timeline page backed by the existing dashboard detail endpoint.

tasks.title: Improve Error Boundaries & Recovery
tasks.description: Add React error boundaries to marketplace and assessment components with graceful fallbacks
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #44. Marketplace and assessment review routes now have explicit error boundaries.

tasks.title: Marketplace List Caching & Pagination Optimization
tasks.description: Implement client-side caching and lazy loading for marketplace packs to improve UX
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #70. Marketplace browsing now reuses cached list responses and progressive load-more pagination.

tasks.title: Teacher Team Invitation & Sharing
tasks.description: Allow teachers to invite colleagues and create team knowledge pack sharing groups
tasks.notes: Verified on 2026-04-25: knowledge router and UI already persist and display team members / pending invites, with coverage in tests/api/test_knowledge_router.py and tests/knowledge/test_kb_metadata_normalization.py.

tasks.title: Assessment Difficulty Adaptive Adjustment
tasks.description: Adjust question difficulty based on student performance during assessment

scope.api: Store difficulty ratings and adjust next question

tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #74. MVP slice implemented adaptive difficulty inference from recent quiz performance context before template generation.

tasks.title: Mobile-First Marketplace Responsive Design
tasks.description: Optimize marketplace pack cards and filters for mobile/tablet viewports
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #76. Mobile/tablet marketplace layout now has safer filters, card spacing, CTA layout, and preview modal scrolling.

tasks.title: Teacher Analytics Dashboard
tasks.description: Add comprehensive analytics for teachers: student engagement, assessment trends, common difficulties
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #78. Dashboard overview now includes teacher-facing engagement, assessment trend, and learning signal analytics.

tasks.title: API Rate Limiting & Throttling
tasks.description: Implement rate limiting for marketplace and assessment endpoints to prevent abuse
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #44 and follow-up PR #49. API middleware now enforces per-policy rate limits with isolated buckets.

tasks.title: Full-Text Search for Marketplace Packs
tasks.description: Implement full-text search across pack name, description, objectives, and content

scope.database: Add full-text search index if using database

tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #80. Marketplace search now matches broader metadata/objective text and is wired through the list API.

tasks.title: Assessment Time Tracking & Analytics
tasks.description: Track time spent per question and show time-based analytics in results
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #82. Assessment review now records optional per-question duration_seconds inside the existing [Quiz Performance] transcript and surfaces total/average/per-question timing without a new storage table.

tasks.title: Smart Tutor Follow-Up Questions
tasks.description: Tutor suggests follow-up questions based on student's answer quality to deepen understanding

scope.api: Extend tutor response with suggested questions

tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #84. The tutoring chat pipeline can now emit a visible 'Follow-up questions:' section and parse the same section back into result.followup_questions metadata without changing the chat route.

tasks.title: Knowledge Pack Versioning System
tasks.description: Support multiple versions of knowledge packs with change tracking
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #86. Lightweight version metadata now records current_version and version_history for teacher-pack metadata updates in the knowledge config flow.

tasks.title: Suggested Learning Path Sequencing
tasks.description: Generate recommended sequence of topics based on prerequisites and learning objectives
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #89. Student progress now exposes a deterministic suggested_learning_path sequence built from weak topics and knowledge-pack learning objectives.

tasks.title: Batch Import Multiple Packs
tasks.description: Allow teachers to select and import multiple packs at once
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #91. Marketplace now supports batch import through a shared single-pack import helper plus multi-select UI.

tasks.title: Offline Mode for Downloaded Packs
tasks.description: Cache downloaded packs and enable offline assessment taking
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #93. Imported packs now have a browser-local offline manifest fallback and loaded quiz results can queue sync until the browser reconnects.

tasks.title: Contest Smoke and Evidence Refresh
tasks.description: Refresh the smoke-backed contest validation record, mark screenshot freshness honestly, and keep AI-first control-plane docs aligned with the derived evidence lane.
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #96. Command-backed contest smoke evidence is refreshed to 2026-04-24 and screenshot evidence is explicitly marked stale pending recapture.

tasks.title: Contest Screenshot Evidence Refresh
tasks.description: Refresh the linked contest screenshot bundle so screenshot evidence can move from stale back to current after the recent UI merges.
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #99. Contest screenshot evidence was refreshed to current on 2026-04-24 and linked docs now point at the latest screenshot bundle.

tasks.title: Contest Submission Package Freshness Sync
tasks.description: Sync the contest-facing README and submission package with the latest merged smoke and screenshot evidence state so submission entry docs no longer point at the older validation window.
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #101. Contest-facing README and submission package now reflect the latest 2026-04-24 smoke and screenshot evidence state.

tasks.title: Submission Checklist Evidence Alignment
tasks.description: Align the final contest submission checklist with AI-verifiable repo evidence, while keeping human-only review items explicitly unchecked.
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #103. The final submission checklist now distinguishes AI-verifiable items from human-only review items.

tasks.title: Contest Product Description Draft
tasks.description: Draft the contest product description from current MVP evidence, pitch notes, and submission materials so the remaining submission checklist gaps narrow to human approval rather than missing text.
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #105. Added ai_first/competition/product-description.md and linked it into the submission package/checklist.

tasks.title: Contest Fork Modifications Note
tasks.description: Document how this repository extends HKUDS/DeepTutor for the VnExpress contest MVP so the final AI-doable submission checklist item is backed by a concise repo note.
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #107. Added ai_first/competition/fork-modifications.md and wired it into the submission package/checklist.

tasks.title: Contest Human Review Handoff
tasks.description: Package the remaining human-only submission work into a short review path so the AI-first queue can land in a clean waiting-on-human state instead of a stale in-progress state.
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #109. Added docs/contest/HUMAN_REVIEW_HANDOFF.md and linked the final manual review path from the submission package.

tasks.title: Optional Contest Video Capture Runbook
tasks.description: Prepare a concise optional video storyboard and recording runbook so the team can produce a contest video artifact quickly if the final submission requires one.

scope.docs: docs/contest/VIDEO_CAPTURE_RUNBOOK.md, docs/contest/EVIDENCE_CHECKLIST.md, docs/contest/SUBMISSION_PACKAGE.md, docs/contest/HUMAN_REVIEW_HANDOFF.md, docs/superpowers/tasks/, docs/superpowers/pr-notes/

tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #113. Added docs/contest/VIDEO_CAPTURE_RUNBOOK.md and linked it into contest evidence/submission docs without marking video as captured.

tasks.title: Contest MVP Vietnamese Coverage Audit and Fix Pass
tasks.description: Close obvious English leakage on contest MVP screens and align Vietnamese wording across the contest-facing teacher and student workflow.
dependencies: Current contest MVP screens on main
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #122. Localized contest-facing marketplace, knowledge, and dashboard screens and expanded Vietnamese coverage for the MVP flow.

tasks.title: Marketplace and Knowledge Pack Screen Polish
tasks.description: Improve the teacher-facing marketplace and knowledge-pack surfaces so discovery, metadata editing, preview, and import feedback feel more complete and less prototype-like.
dependencies: Current marketplace and knowledge UI on main
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #124. Polished marketplace and knowledge-pack teacher screens without widening backend scope.

tasks.title: Dashboard and Review Screen Copy and UX Polish
tasks.description: Refine teacher dashboard, assessment review, and tutoring replay screen copy and empty-state quality so the contest flow reads like one coherent workflow.
dependencies: Current dashboard UI contracts on main
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #125. Improved dashboard, assessment review, and replay readability while keeping existing contracts intact.

tasks.title: Contest Flow Operating Hygiene Refresh
tasks.description: Refresh stale coordination docs, assignment state, and queue mirrors so two parallel sessions can start the contest MVP polish experiment with accurate ownership and status.

scope.control_plane: ai_first/ACTIVE_ASSIGNMENTS.md, ai_first/EXECUTION_QUEUE.md, ai_first/AI_OPERATING_PROMPT.md, ai_first/CURRENT_STATE.md, ai_first/NEXT_ACTIONS.md, ai_first/daily/2026-04-25.md

tasks.notes: Completed by the post-lane control-plane sync after the two-lane experiment finished. Queue, prompt, snapshots, and assignments now reflect the merged lane results.

tasks.title: Parallel Lane Task Packet Set
tasks.description: Create explicit task packets and rollout notes for the two-lane contest MVP polish experiment so each account has bounded owned files and do-not-touch rules.
tasks.notes: Completed on the docs rollout branch before implementation began. The lane packets and rollout note were then exercised by T044 through T051.

tasks.title: Knowledge and Marketplace Metadata Depth Pass
tasks.description: Deepen teacher-facing pack metadata and marketplace detail contracts so metadata quality feels more complete without redesigning the product.
tasks.notes: Lane 2 bounded depth slice. It should add contract depth without forcing simultaneous Lane 1 page rewrites.

tasks.title: Dashboard Insight Depth Pass
tasks.description: Make teacher dashboard summaries and assessment review outputs more actionable through bounded contract additions rather than a new analytics subsystem.
dependencies: Current dashboard and review routes on main
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #123. Added bounded dashboard insight depth and additive TypeScript client support.

tasks.title: Tutor and Assessment Session Context Quality Pass
tasks.description: Improve session review and tutoring context quality so the contest learning loop feels less thin while staying inside existing session and reply flows.
dependencies: Current session and tutoring flows on main
tasks.notes: Merged to main through PR #126. Added additive session context support to session/review payloads and tutoring result metadata.

marketplace_import.title: [MVP] Implement Marketplace Pack Import Functionality
marketplace_import.body:
**Priority:** Critical (P1)

**Description:**
Replace placeholder import logic in Marketplace page. Currently shows success message but doesn't actually copy pack to user workspace.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Import button triggers actual pack copying
- [ ] Pack metadata, documents, and config copied to knowledge_bases
- [ ] Success/error feedback shown to user
- [ ] Imported pack appears in user's Knowledge Pack list

**Implementation:**
- Backend: Add POST /api/v1/marketplace/import/{pack_name} endpoint
- Frontend: Update handleImportPack function
- API Client: Add importMarketplacePack function

assessment_feedback.title: [MVP] Enhance Assessment Review with Detailed Feedback
assessment_feedback.body:
**Priority:** Critical (P2)

**Description:**
Add detailed analysis breakdown, topic-based performance, and personalized learning recommendations to assessment review page.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Show performance breakdown by topic
- [ ] Display learning recommendations based on incorrect answers
- [ ] Add topic mastery visualization
- [ ] Suggest next learning steps

**Implementation:**
- Backend: Create /api/v1/dashboard/assessment-analysis endpoint
- Frontend: Extend ProgressIndicator component with analysis section

kb_context_badges.title: [MVP] Add KB Context Display in Tutoring Session
kb_context_badges.body:
**Priority:** High (P3)

**Description:**
Display active knowledge base context badges in student tutoring session to show learning sources.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] KB badges shown in chat interface
- [ ] Clear indication of which pack question comes from
- [ ] Consistent styling with rest of UI

**Implementation:**
- Extract KB context from UnifiedContext
- Add visual badges to ChatMessageList

vietnamese_prompts.title: [MVP] Add Vietnamese Language Prompts
vietnamese_prompts.body:
**Priority:** High (P10)

**Description:**
Create Vietnamese language variants for all LLM prompts to complete i18n support.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Vietnamese prompts for solve agent
- [ ] Vietnamese prompts for question generation
- [ ] Vietnamese prompts for tutoring
- [ ] Fallback chain works (vi -> en)

**Implementation:**
- Create deeptutor/agents/*/prompts/vi/ directories
- Translate prompt YAML files

performance_risks.risk: Marketplace queries become slow with many packs
performance_risks.mitigation: Implement database indexing on sharing_status, subject, owner; add pagination

performance_risks.risk: Large pack imports cause UI freeze
performance_risks.mitigation: Implement background import worker with progress notification

ux_risks.risk: Users don't understand KB context in tutoring
ux_risks.mitigation: Add T011 KB context badges and help tooltip
Implement collapsible filter panel for mobile, T026

technical_risks.risk: API rate limiting not implemented, abuse possible
technical_risks.mitigation: Implement T028 rate limiting immediately after initial MVP

technical_risks.risk: Error handling gaps cause blank pages
technical_risks.mitigation: Add error boundaries and user-friendly error messages, T022
